note: Manually-maintained SecOps posture register. Feeds Labwatch SecOps panel. Update statuses here when actions are completed.

pending_rotations.label: HuggingFace token (public GitHub leak)
pending_rotations.why: Live hf_ token committed in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-08-huggingface-ab-integration.md, pushed to PUBLIC master5d/NAUTILUS (commit e237004, 2026-05-20). Masked in working tree 2026-06-11, history still contains it.
pending_rotations.action: huggingface.co/settings/tokens → Revoke + create new → setup-litellm-keys.ps1 (HF_TOKEN). Optionally git filter-repo to purge history.

pending_rotations.label: GitHub fine-grained PAT (was embedded in git remote URL)
pending_rotations.why: PAT stored plaintext in .git/config remote URL; printed to terminal/session transcript during 2026-06-11 audit.
pending_rotations.action: github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens → Revoke. Remote already cleaned to plain https + gh credential helper.

pending_rotations.label: GitHub CLI OAuth token (master5d)
pending_rotations.why: Leaked to stdout 2026-05-30 (env-var dup of keyring token)
pending_rotations.action: github.com/settings/applications → Authorized OAuth Apps → GitHub CLI → Revoke, then `gh auth login`

pending_rotations.label: CrowdSec LAPI bouncer key
pending_rotations.why: Was hardcoded in cloudflare-bouncer.yaml until 2026-06-11 (never in git)
pending_rotations.action: `cscli bouncers add` on (re)deploy of the stack

pending_rotations.label: Local docker stack passwords (langfuse/neo4j/karakeep)
pending_rotations.why: Volumes initialized with weak defaults (changeme-local, sovrn-local-pass); now required via docker/.env but values unchanged. Ports rebound to 127.0.0.1 as mitigation.
pending_rotations.action: docker compose up → ALTER USER/cypher password change in each DB → update docker/.env

infra_stack.note: Never deployed; Docker absent locally. Pre-deploy code fixes done 2026-06-11 (wazuh config dupe, retaliation input validation); regenerate LAPI key via cscli on deploy.

agent_attack_classes.note: Agent-specific threat classes — the gap classic SAST (semgrep) + secrets (gitleaks) do NOT cover. Taxonomy adopted from ship-safe trial 2026-06-11 (see memory reference_shipsafe_trial). Detection currently MANUAL/none unless noted.

classes.label: Agent-config prompt injection
classes.what: Hidden/override instructions in CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, MCP manifests — read by the agent as trusted context
classes.detection: automated — agent-config-guard hook (SessionStart advisory scan + PostToolUse block on high-confidence write); secops/hooks/agent-config-guard.py

classes.label: Memory poisoning
classes.what: Instruction injection + hidden Unicode payloads in persistent agent memory files (ASI-01/ASI-05)
classes.detection: automated — agent-config-guard hook: zero-width/bidi/Unicode-Tag detection + exfil-pipe + HTML-comment override; same script

classes.label: MCP / plugin supply chain
classes.what: Tool poisoning, typosquatting, unpinned versions, unsigned manifests, shadow MCP configs
classes.surface: enabledPlugins, installed_plugins.json pins, ~/.claude.json + claude_desktop_config.json MCP servers, marketplaces
classes.detection: automated — claude-posture-audit hook: attestation vs committed baseline (baselines/claude-posture-baseline.json); flags new plugin/marketplace/MCP-server (HIGH), pin change (MED). Manual pins + inventory back it.

classes.label: Excessive agency / always-allow
classes.what: always_allow tool policies, unrestricted networking, over-privileged CI agents (ASI-03..07)
classes.detection: automated — claude-posture-audit hook: absolute policy rules (bypassPermissions, dangerous allow wildcards, deny-list gaps, skip-dangerous-prompt) + hook-command drift vs baseline. Backed by deny list + egress-guard.

deploy_targets.label: AppArmor MAC profiles
deploy_targets.what: Mandatory access control for agent/container processes on the Hetzner node (confine docker, n8n, agent runtimes)
deploy_targets.how: aa-status → profile per service in enforce mode; docker --security-opt apparmor=<profile>

deploy_targets.label: Falco runtime detection
deploy_targets.what: eBPF runtime alerts incl. custom rules (prompt-injection patterns in n8n/qdrant logs, vault tampering) → Falcosidekick → n8n/Telegram

deploy_targets.label: Wazuh FIM (file integrity monitoring)
deploy_targets.what: 24/7 FIM on configs, vault dirs, agent configs; SIEM correlation
deploy_targets.how: infra/wazuh/deploy_wazuh.sh (fix WSL path first); enable syscheck on /root/sovern + /etc

accepted_risks: read_only:true not set on crowdsec/bouncer containers (write to volumes) — revisit with tmpfs at deploy
infra/.env holds live secrets on disk — gitignored + read-denied; migrate to vault on Bitwarden revival
defaultMode=bypassPermissions — ACCEPTED 2026-06-11 as intentional for autonomous sessions (enables prompt-free agent runs); supersedes the acceptEdits hardening note. In baseline.accepted.
skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt=true — ACCEPTED 2026-06-11 alongside bypassPermissions. In baseline.accepted.
